pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent POM version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+; using Spring Boot 1.5.x with Java 21 results in compilation errors due to deprecated/removed APIs and incompatible bytecode.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the build targets Java 8 bytecode, which is incompatible with the intended Java 21 runtime environment and Spring Boot 3.x requirements.

src/test/java/com/springmvc/springmongod.general_idea: Migrate test class from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 by replacing the legacy @RunWith annotation with the default JUnit 5 execution model.
src/test/java/com/springmvc/springmongod.why_exists: JUnit 4 runner annotations are not recognized by the JUnit 5 platform; tests would fail to execute or be ignored without this migration.

src/test/java/com/springmvc/springmongod.general_idea: Update import statements to use JUnit 5 API instead of JUnit 4.
src/test/java/com/springmvc/springmongod.why_exists: JUnit 4 classes (org.junit.Test, org.junit.runner.RunWith) are not available or compatible with the JUnit 5 test engine in Spring Boot 3.x.
